title: Understanding Data Governance
text: Consider the role of the data governance team in maintaining data quality. What are their primary responsibilities when a data quality issue is identified?

title: Data Quality Issue Escalation
text: Think about the process that follows when a data quality issue is identified. What steps are taken if the issue persists beyond a certain time frame?

title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
text: What is an SLA, and how does it relate to the time frame for resolving data quality issues?

hintAnswer: Escalating the resolution of the data quality issue that the data scientist found. Once the time the issue has existed exceeds the remediation SLA defined in the data quality policy, it is time to escalate.
title: Identifying the Correct Action
text: Based on the responsibilities of the data governance team and the concept of SLA, what should be the next step if the issue is not resolved in time?
choices: Remediating all the data quality issues which the data analyst has identified

Escalating the resolution of the data quality issue that the data scientist found. Once the time the issue has existed exceeds the remediation SLA defined in the data quality policy, it is time to escalate.
Defining data quality rules for the data that the analyst uses
